horoscope: The New Moon today is a kickstarter, dear Aries, as it occurs in your sign. If you’ve been putting something off, you’re quick to recognize the need to get going! This New Moon brings a whole new orientation, a blast of personal energy, and a sense that you’re revving up. Again today, your natural talents, the areas where you shine, and your savvy are readily discoverable and perhaps on display. It’s a potentially strong time for a renewed sense of purpose, and it’s also time to present yourself in ways that serve you best. You have all the power to make meaningful changes, and you can fill up with new ideas and hope in the coming days. As exciting as this fresh energy feels, don't burn yourself out by pushing too hard or expecting instant results. Make plans that take the future into account. Otherwise, you might find yourself running out of steam. It's time to recreate your personality as you'd truly like it to be, and you have all of the power to do so. Use this time to envision what you'd like to do or be in the year ahead.

Today’s New Moon occurs in your solar twelfth house, dear Taurus, marking a period ahead of review, letting go, seeking closure, and recharging your batteries. This New Moon reminds you to take care of unfinished business before moving forward. Whether it’s a path or an attitude that needs to be put behind you, it’s clear you need to make an important change. Something hidden or a secret could emerge, and while this can be disconcerting at first, it’s also freeing. New energy is with you for dealing with matters of the past. In the weeks ahead, you may need to put some things to rest, and this New Moon highlights this need. You might consider how to bring more quiet time for reflection or increased privacy into your life. You need it! The cycle before you brings the need to review and reflect upon events since your last birthday and to decide what attitudes or situations may need to be left behind so that you can improve, grow, and thrive.

Today’s New Moon brings the chance to start fresh socially or with a particular friend, dear Gemini. Instead, it might serve to renew your interest in pursuing a specific happiness goal. With this lunation occurring in your sector of friends, teamwork, group associations, and ideals, these areas may undergo changes in the days ahead. Emotional honesty, sharing your feelings with friends, and willingness to recognize others as integral to your success and fulfillment — all of these things help improve existing friendships and possibly bring you new allies. Someone special or memories of people from your past can spur you on or motivate you to pursue a dream. Soon enough, you’ll feel more confident about taking a new or improved path. The change is likely to be empowering, even if your first instinct is to resist it. A friend or even a friend of a friend can open a window of opportunity for you, so aim to pay close attention and stay connected. Getting in touch with your innermost hopes and wishes is in the picture during this phase of your life. Your sense of place in your community or belonging can drive much of what you do in the period ahead.

Today's New Moon brings a renewal of professional steam and the determination to overcome stumbling blocks, dear Cancer. This New Moon occurs in your solar tenth house, and in the next few days, Mercury, Mars, and Saturn converge there, making it a powerful time to pour yourself into a project that gets you somewhere. You’re in a position of power to tear down obstacles in your path and solve problems. Aim to be forthright yet sensitive to your audience, especially in public or professional arenas. It might be necessary to make some personal sacrifices to overcome a hurdle; the key is to be patient. Eliminating waste in your professional life can be especially helpful now, and you may need to assess the viability of a project/goal to know your next step. You’re likely to reach higher in the coming weeks. This lunation brings extra power and fresh energy to your professional goals, career, life-path goals, or reputation. Acknowledging fears honestly can send you in a new direction. New beginnings can emerge after ridding yourself of outdated attitudes and possibly even projects that have been holding you back from moving forward. Old plans or projects may fall out of focus as you make room for new ones. Avoid impulsive moves, but pay attention to sudden urges and hunches.

Today’s New Moon prompts a time for a change of routine, dear Leo, whether through exploring new interests or finding more time to explore the world beyond your ordinary activities. This lunation may act as a charge, sending you in a new direction. In the week ahead, you may be initiating new projects or activities that expand your mind, feed your spirit for adventure, and stretch your imagination. It’s a wonderful time to think about the big picture and discover new avenues for self-expression. New worlds are opening up to you as you expand your mind, and you may be embracing different ideas. It can be a time when you are considering making big changes, such as a new course/line of study, or direction. You are more inclined to follow your heart and your passions, but influences now call on you to exercise some self-discipline. It’s best to deal with problem areas head-on. Do your best to focus on a game plan or strategy rather than dwell on the frustration of current obstacles. You’re putting your life into better order now, which will ultimately be a relief. Aim to draw upon patience before a plan unfolds, but enjoy a pleasant change of pace and the budding confidence or inspiration in the air now.

In focus in the days ahead can be a financial plan, dealing with debt, or pouring special energy into a passion project, dear Virgo, due to the energies of today's New Moon. Taking charge of the areas of life where you feel unhealthily dependent on others comes naturally at this time. The emphasis is on emotions, close ties, dreams, and your inner world, and you’ll be making nice improvements. This New Moon can prompt a desire or need to turn over a new leaf. Sudden awareness of your needs may inspire you to start fresh–you want to turn things around! A dependency or financial matter can figure strongly–you might want to feel less dependent on others, or you might feel motivated to address trust issues that have hijacked your life in some way. You might take an intimate relationship to a new level or discover something powerful about yourself. You’re likely to have a clearer view of what you want from yourself and others, and this insight can bring about substantial changes to your life. A reality check on a financial or intimate level can be part of this. Aim to sort things out, debug plans, and review recent life issues with maturity and realism. A partner’s money or support can be a source of stress, but it’s a good time to work on plans to improve. There's a general feeling of starting fresh in the air today, along with increased responsibilities. Try not to push so hard that you run out of steam—pace yourself.

Today’s New Moon brings you the chance to improve or attract close partnerships in the period ahead, dear Libra. Restructuring and renovating are in order! Honoring others in your life or exploring relationship goals seems a vital route to fulfillment and success these days. This New Moon is about your relationship with others on a one-to-one level and how you go about balancing your needs with those of another. It may also be a time for gaining a new perspective on your life through the eyes of someone else. Negotiations and one-to-one relationships are in focus, and a new start can be in store. This can be a time to redefine or put new effort into your relationships. Consider your contribution to a connection, and aim to put as much effort as you can into doing your part to your own satisfaction. You receive a boost of courage and confidence through your activities with others or via a connection with a friend or partner. At the same time, responsibilities to others can feel weighty, and the reality of a relationship or person in your life can be in focus. Be patient, mature, and responsible now for the best results and long-term rewards. There could be new directions in a relationship or increased awareness of what you need and want. This week, a symbolic fresh start or wiping of the slate clean occurs, and dysfunctional relating patterns can be put behind you now. You see what you value in a new light. What you feel and see now are important, but do avoid impulsive moves. Relationship needs are awakened and can feel urgent, but try to wait things out before making significant changes.

Today’s New Moon helps clear the path for new beginnings related to self-care, work, and wellness, dear Scorpio. The days ahead are strong for embarking on new or improved projects in these areas. It can be about putting the past limitations behind you to make way for the new. Health and wellness programs or resolutions for better organizing your daily life launched in the coming days have a strong chance of surviving. This New Moon gives your resolutions or projects an energizing push. You begin to feel ready to turn over a new leaf. Keep in mind that while there is an excellent opportunity to start fresh, your goals must be gently challenging and reasonable enough that you don’t psyche yourself out before you even begin. Pace yourself, but also believe in yourself! Watch for impulsive or impatient moves now, but listen to hunches and instincts.

Today’s New Moon occurs in your sector of joy, dear Sagittarius, and you can be determined to start fresh. Now and in the coming days, you could find new ways of expressing yourself in uniquely creative ways or through rewarding pastimes or a romantic relationship. If obstacles interfere with your time for relaxation, it’s a great time to address them. Your need for expression through play, amusement, and hobbies is powerful. You want to make an impact with what you create or with who you are, and you may be investing more of yourself in your romantic life, your children, your hobbies, and your creative work. Of course, with a stronger investment, there are stronger emotions. Certainly, there could be a reality, slowdown, or block encountered in a relationship or creative project, but consider that it might support you more adequately in the future. Self-honesty is important now. While you can feel raring to go in some ways, it's also vital to pace yourself.

Today’s New Moon brings dynamic energy to your domestic world or personal life, dear Capricorn. If you want to make changes in your home, your domestic routines, your family relationships, or even your relationship with your inner self, the days ahead can be pivotal. It’s a time for giving extra attention to your domestic world. Aim to face uncomfortable matters with self-honesty so you can leave a negative attitude or situation behind you. You have much wisdom to gain now, particularly about your heart’s desires and deeper needs and feelings. It's a time to overcome emotional hurdles. Family, home, or inner life can be animated, vivid, and exciting. At the same time, you may need to manage blocks or restrictions, or recognize the need to bring more structure to your domestic world. The focus now should be on strengthening and rebuilding; you can feel good about doing your part and meeting your responsibilities. You become more aware of your need for a support system now, which motivates you to improve, change, and enhance your domestic world.

Today’s New Moon can motivate you to take on new studies or a special-interest project, dear Aquarius, or it can bring on a more connected, busier daily life. There can certainly be a lot coming in, many things to do, and a generally quick pace in the days ahead. This New Moon occurs in your communications and learning sector, launching a cycle that adds emphasis to your life on communication skills, learning, and daily interactions and contacts. You’re better able to establish a mental rapport with others. You’re making a difference with what you say or how you connect with others, and you can be in line for a fresh start related to your special interests, studies, connecting, learning, or commuting. You have more power to actualize your dreams, but you must take responsibility, follow the rules, and put in the work. Challenges getting your ideas across can lead to better communication or transportation channels later. Aim to liberate yourself from unrealistic dreams if they weigh you down.

Today’s New Moon can usher in a fresh start involving money, finances, business, or career, dear Pisces. New energy is with you for creating success, and ambition increases, but it’s best not to jump into the first project you see. Instead, aim to embrace your newfound faith and take concrete steps to stay grounded. It’s a powerful time for self-honesty, especially surrounding money, income, and talents. This lunation can serve as a prompt toward improved management of your practical affairs. It’s time to take charge of your finances and make meaningful, long-lasting changes to your earnings and your spending habits. You’re motivated to make your life secure and comfortable. Soon, you can feel a strong desire to take action on a money-making idea, open a savings account, or create a budget — anything that helps you build up, manage, or take charge of your resources. Aim to expect more, within reason, from yourself now, and remind yourself that facing financial realities is a crucial step towards your financial stability and success.
